data.title: ticket transition command requires current_status arg but agents often omit it
data.description: Agents frequently call `.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <id> <target_status>` (2 args) instead of the required 3-arg form `.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <id> <current_status> <target_status>`. The error message is cryptic ('Usage: ticket transition ...') with no indication that current_status is required as positional arg. CLAUDE.md references the command but the example in the quick reference table only shows the full form without flagging that both current and target status are required positional args. Needs either: (1) a clearer CLAUDE.md rule in the 'Always Do These' section citing the exact 3-arg form with a warning, or (2) an update to dso:using-lockpick with explicit examples of the correct syntax, or (3) a defensive wrapper in the CLI that accepts 2-arg form and looks up current status automatically.
